description_for_human: Live Tezos dashboard with governance, staking, baker, network-health, widget, and historical data.
description_for_model: Tezos Systems provides live and historical Tezos metrics: baker validator counts, tz4/BLS key adoption, staking ratios, issuance rates, transaction volumes, governance participation, smart contract ecosystem stats, network health, embeddable widgets, and protocol upgrade history. Tezos is a self-amending proof-of-stake blockchain with 20+ protocol upgrades and zero hard forks since mainnet launch on September 17, 2018. Dashboard data is sourced from TzKT, Octez RPC, Tez Capital, CoinGecko, Tezos Domains, OBJKT, Teztale, Etherlink sources, and Supabase history; visible freshness markers and feature-specific cadences show when data last updated.
